fieldEvents.name: Pokémon GO Fest 2017
fieldEvents.details: First ever Go Fest. Plagued by technical issues; Niantic offered full refunds and $100 in Pokécoins.

fieldEvents.name: Pokémon GO Fest 2018
fieldEvents.details: Celebi Special Research debut. Featured diverse habitat zones.

fieldEvents.name: Safari Zone Dortmund 2018
fieldEvents.details: Shiny Roselia debut. Unown letters D-O-R-T-M-U-N-D available.

fieldEvents.name: Pokémon GO Fest 2019
fieldEvents.details: Jirachi Special Research debut. Habitat zones with rotating spawns.

fieldEvents.name: Pokémon GO Fest 2019 Dortmund
fieldEvents.details: European Go Fest event.

fieldEvents.name: Pokémon GO Fest 2019 Yokohama
fieldEvents.location: Rinko Park / Red Brick Warehouse, Yokohama, Japan
fieldEvents.details: Asia Go Fest event.

fieldEvents.name: Pokémon GO Fest 2020
fieldEvents.details: First fully virtual Go Fest. Victini Special Research debut.

fieldEvents.name: Pokémon GO Tour: Kanto
fieldEvents.details: Shiny Mew debut via Special Research. Red/Green version choice. All 150 Kanto shinies available.

fieldEvents.name: Pokémon GO Fest 2021
fieldEvents.details: Meloetta Special Research debut. Day 1: habitat hours. Day 2: raid day.

fieldEvents.name: Pokémon GO Tour: Johto
fieldEvents.details: Gold/Silver version choice. Apex Shadow Ho-Oh and Apex Shadow Lugia.

fieldEvents.name: Pokémon GO Fest 2022
fieldEvents.details: Shaymin (Land Forme) debut. Nihilego Ultra Beast debut.

fieldEvents.name: Pokémon GO Fest 2022: Sapporo
fieldEvents.details: In-person Go Fest with Pansage, Panpour, Pansear spawns.

fieldEvents.name: Pokémon GO Fest 2022: Berlin
fieldEvents.details: In-person European Go Fest.

fieldEvents.name: Pokémon GO Fest 2022: Seattle
fieldEvents.details: In-person Go Fest finale.

fieldEvents.name: Pokémon GO Tour: Hoenn - Las Vegas
fieldEvents.details: Primal Groudon & Primal Kyogre debut. Shiny Kecleon debut. Ruby/Sapphire version choice.

fieldEvents.name: Pokémon GO Tour: Hoenn - Global
fieldEvents.details: Global event with Primal Raids and all Hoenn shinies.

fieldEvents.name: Pokémon GO Fest 2023: London
fieldEvents.details: Diancie debut. Mega Rayquaza debut. Shiny Unown ! debut.

fieldEvents.name: Pokémon GO Fest 2023: Osaka
fieldEvents.details: Diancie debut. Mega Rayquaza. Shiny Dewpider & Shiny Petilil debut.

fieldEvents.name: Pokémon GO Fest 2023: New York City
fieldEvents.location: Randall's Island Park, New York City, USA
fieldEvents.details: Diancie & Mega Rayquaza available. Third in-person Go Fest city of 2023.

fieldEvents.name: Pokémon GO Fest 2023: Global
fieldEvents.details: Global Go Fest event with Diancie access for ticket holders.
